rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); fail if total_hits >= 1
candidate_summary: ATLATL-LEVER gradient leverage via learned CoT extension policy: passive lever-extension analogy from Aztec atlatl applied to RLVR fine-tuning where model optionally appends k extra reasoning tokens; final-answer correctness gradient back-propagates through entire chain (mechanical advantage = 1 + k/L_base). Combines (i) learned extension policy, (ii) proportional gradient leverage through chain, (iii) mechanical-advantage ratio as RL hyperparameter.

results_analysis.title: RLVR Implicitly Incentivizes Correct Reasoning in Base LLMs
results_analysis.rationale: Direct match on learned RLVR incentivizing long CoT with gradient back-prop through chain length; covers candidate's core mechanism.

results_analysis.title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning via RL
results_analysis.rationale: DeepSeek-R1-Zero exhibits steady self-evolutionary increase in thinking time via RL, the canonical instantiation of learned CoT length extension under reward gradient — exact match to candidate.

results_analysis.title: State of RL for LLM Reasoning (DAPO)
results_analysis.rationale: DAPO's token-level policy gradient explicitly addresses gradient propagation through long CoT — the exact lever-leverage mechanism the candidate proposes.

results_analysis.title: Post-Training in 2026: GRPO DAPO RLVR Beyond
results_analysis.rationale: Survey of 2026 post-training techniques covering RLVR/DAPO/GRPO — overlaps with candidate's combined-components claim.

results_analysis.title: APMPO Adaptive Power-Mean Policy Optimization
results_analysis.rationale: Adjacent adaptive RL training method; semantic and functional thresholds both met.

results_analysis.title: Resource-Efficient RL for Reasoning LLMs
results_analysis.rationale: Adaptive compute/token allocation policy — same adaptive CoT-length policy mechanism.

results_analysis.title: FoRLM @ NeurIPS 25 accepted papers
results_analysis.rationale: Workshop list page only; below all thresholds.

results_analysis.title: Re2: Unlocking LLM Reasoning via RL with Re-solving
results_analysis.rationale: Re-solving RL reasoning with extended chain — related lever-extension mechanism just above threshold.

verdict_sentence: Candidate FAILS verification: 7 of 8 results exceed the hit thresholds (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, func>=0.7), with DeepSeek-R1 (func 0.92, sem 0.86), RLVR-implicit (func 0.82, sem 0.84), and DAPO token-level gradient (func 0.84, sem 0.82) directly instantiating the ATLATL-LEVER mechanism of learned CoT-length extension with gradient leverage through long chains under RLVR — the candidate's three combined components (learned extension policy, proportional gradient leverage, mechanical-advantage ratio) are already covered by existing literature.
